definition: The ability to recognize interpret question and responsibly use algorithmic systems.
Visibility into the steps rules objectives or workflow of a system.
Visibility into what data signals sources or representations enter a system.
Clarity about what scores labels rankings recommendations or forecasts mean.
Communication of confidence limits ambiguity model scope or error risk.
Ability for affected people to correct data appeal outcomes or request review.
Presence of monitoring documentation accountability and revision processes.
Attention to who is affected by algorithmic outputs and how.
Design that keeps human interpretation responsibility and review active.
